spec_match.rationale: Direct two-scroller test of the spec behaviour: previously the second cancelled the first, now both animate.

interactive.rationale: The page now offers both the native concurrent run and a labeled pre-130 counterfactual button, with live metric cards and reset state updates.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept and feature copy both describe the same two-scroller concurrent run plus the counterfactual cancellation contrast.

edge_cases.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP verification first confirmed the missing serial/counterfactual control, then exercised the repaired page: the modern run moved A and B 548px together, the counterfactual left A 269px from start while B moved 548px, reset returned both scrollTop values to 0 and cleared the cards, the demo had no console errors, and the feature conformance route reported 5 PASS / 0 FAIL.
